ddls:
CREATE TABLE "energy_metrics" (
  "metric_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each metric entry */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp for when the data is recorded */,
  "network_load" REAL /* Network load measured in kW */,
  "pv_generation" REAL /* Photovoltaic generation in kW */,
  "grid_import" REAL /* Energy imported from the grid in kW */,
  "grid_export" REAL /* Energy exported to the grid in kW */,
  "node_id" INTEGER /* Identifier for the grid node where the data is collected */,
  "weather_conditions" TEXT /* Description of weather conditions at the time of measurement */,
  "temperature" REAL /* Temperature at the node during the measurement */,
  "humidity" REAL /* Humidity at the node during the measurement */,
  "wind_speed" REAL /* Wind speed at the node during the measurement */,
  "solar_irradiance" REAL /* Solar irradiance at the node during the measurement */,
  "energy_storage" REAL /* Energy stored in any storage systems (e.g., batteries) at the node */,
  "energy_consumption" REAL /* Total energy consumption at the node */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("metric_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "customer_imports" (
  "import_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each import entry */,
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* Identifier for the customer importing energy */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp of the import event */,
  "amount" REAL /* Amount of energy imported by the customer in kW */,
  "import_source" TEXT /* Source of the imported energy */,
  "import_reason" TEXT /* Reason for the import */,
  "location" TEXT /* Physical location of the customer */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("import_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_customer_imports_customer_id FOREIGN KEY ("customer_id") REFERENCES customers ("customer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "customer_exports" (
  "export_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each export entry */,
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* Identifier for the customer exporting energy */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp of the export event */,
  "amount" REAL /* Amount of energy exported by the customer in kW */,
  "export_destination" TEXT /* Destination of the exported energy */,
  "export_reason" TEXT /* Reason for the export */,
  "location" TEXT /* Physical location of the customer */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("export_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_customer_exports_customer_id FOREIGN KEY ("customer_id") REFERENCES customers ("customer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "customers" (
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each customer */,
  "name" TEXT /* Full name of the customer */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the customer */,
  "address" TEXT /* Physical address of the customer */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Contact phone number of the customer */,
  "account_status" TEXT /* Status of the customer's account */,
  "account_type" TEXT /* Type of account */,
  "energy_source" TEXT /* Primary source of energy */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("customer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_roles" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., admin, analyst, customer service) */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department the user belongs to */,
  "permissions" TEXT /* Specific permissions assigned to the user */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Timestamp of the user's last login */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)
